request.description:
StartFragment

## POST /api/register

### 📄 Description

Créer un compte client avec un **profil alimentaire (dietary profile)**.

### 🔐 Auth

❌ Non requise

---

### 📥 Request Body

```
{  "name": "John Doe",  "email": "john@example.com",  "password": "password",  "password_confirmation": "password",  "dietary_preferences": [    "contains_gluten",    "contains_lactose"  ]}

 ```

---

### ✅ Validation

- `name`: required, string  
    
- `email`: required, email, unique  
    
- `password`: required, min 6, confirmed  
    
- `dietary_preferences`: array (optionnel)  
    

---

### 📤 Response (201 Created)

```
{  "message": "User registered successfully",  "token": "1|abcdefg...",  "user": {    "id": 1,    "name": "John Doe",    "email": "john@example.com",    "dietary_preferences": [      "contains_gluten",      "contains_lactose"    ]  }}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## POST /api/login

### 📄 Description

Se connecter et obtenir un **token Sanctum**.

### 🔐 Auth

❌ Non requise

---

### 📥 Request Body

```
{  "email": "john@example.com",  "password": "password"}

 ```

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "message": "Login successful",  "token": "1|abcdefg...",  "user": {    "id": 1,    "name": "John Doe",    "email": "john@example.com"  }}

 ```

---

### ❌ Erreur (401 Unauthorized)

```
{  "message": "Invalid credentials"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## GET /api/me

### 📄 Description

Récupérer les informations de l’utilisateur authentifié.

### 🔐 Auth

✅ Requise

---

### 📥 Headers

```
Authorization: Bearer {token}

 ```

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "id": 1,  "name": "John Doe",  "email": "john@example.com",  "dietary_preferences": [    "contains_gluten",    "contains_lactose"  ],  "created_at": "2026-03-25T08:20:43"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## POST /api/logout

### 📄 Description

Déconnecter l’utilisateur en supprimant le token actif.

### 🔐 Auth

✅ Requise

---

### 📥 Headers

```
Authorization: Bearer {token}

 ```

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "message": "Logged out successfully"}

 ```

EndFragment

item.name: Category Management
List plates belonging to a category

request.description:
## List Plates Belonging to a Category

Retrieves all plates (dishes) that are associated with a specific category, identified by its ID in the URL path.

### Authorization

Requires a Bearer Token passed via the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

 ```

### Request Details

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Method** | `GET` |
| **URL** | `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/categorie/{id}/plats` |
| **Body** | None |

**Path Variables:**

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `id` | The ID of the category whose plates you want to retrieve (e.g., `2`) |

**Headers:**

- `Accept: application/json`
    
- `Content-Type: application/json`
    

### Expected Responses

| Status Code | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` | Successfully retrieved the list of plates for the given category |
| `401 Unauthorized` | Missing or invalid Bearer token |
| `404 Not Found` | No category found with the given ID |

## Get Category Details

Retrieves the full details of a specific category by its ID.

### Authorization

Requires a **Bearer Token** passed via the `Authorization` header. The token is referenced using the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

### Path Parameter

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `id` | The unique identifier of the category to retrieve (e.g., `/api/categorie/1`) |

### Headers

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Accept` | `application/json` |

### Responses

- **200 OK** — Returns the category object with its details (name, description, etc.)
    
- **401 Unauthorized** — Missing or invalid Bearer token
    
- **404 Not Found** — No category found with the given ID

## List All Categories

Retrieves a list of all available food categories in the system.

### Authorization

Requires a Bearer Token passed via the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

 ```

### Request Details

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Method** | `GET` |
| **URL** | `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/categorie` |
| **Body** | None |

**Headers:**

- `Accept: application/json`
    
- `Content-Type: application/json`
    

### Expected Responses

| Status Code | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` | Successfully retrieved the list of categories |
| `401 Unauthorized` | Missing or invalid Bearer token |

Create Category

This endpoint allows admin to create a new category.

Authorization:  
Bearer Token required

Body:  
{  
"name": "Dessert",  
"description": "Sweet dishes"  
}

Responses:  
201 → Created successfully  
422 → Validation error  
403 → Unauthorized

## Update a Category

Updates the details of an existing category identified by its ID in the URL path.

### Authorization

Requires a Bearer Token passed via the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

 ```

### Request Details

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Method** | `PUT` |
| **URL** | `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/categorie/{id}` |
| **Body** | JSON |

**Path Variables:**

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `id` | The ID of the category to update (e.g., `2`) |

**Body Fields:**

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The updated name of the category |
| `description` | `string` | The updated description of the category |
| `is_active` | `boolean` | Whether the category is active or not |

**Example Body:**

``` json
{
  "name": "Updated Moroccan Cuisine",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "is_active": true
}

 ```

### Expected Responses

| Status Code | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` | Category updated successfully |
| `400 Bad Request` | Invalid or missing fields in the request body |
| `401 Unauthorized` | Missing or invalid Bearer token |
| `404 Not Found` | No category found with the given ID |

## Delete a Category

Deletes an existing category identified by its ID. The ID can be provided both as a path segment in the URL and as a query parameter.

### Authorization

Requires a Bearer Token passed via the `Authorization` header.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

 ```

### Request Details

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Method** | `DELETE` |
| **URL** | `http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/categorie/{id}` |
| **Body** | None |

**Path Variables:**

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `id` | The ID of the category to delete (e.g., `2`) |

**Query Parameters:**

| Parameter | Value | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | `2` | The ID of the category to be deleted |

**Headers:**

- `Accept: application/json`
    
- `Content-Type: application/json`
    

### Expected Responses

| Status Code | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| `200 OK` / `204 No Content` | Category deleted successfully |
| `401 Unauthorized` | Missing or invalid Bearer token |
| `404 Not Found` | No category found with the given ID |

item.description:
## Category Management

This collection covers all API operations related to managing food categories in the restaurant platform. Categories are used to organize plates (dishes) into logical groups such as "Dessert", "Moroccan Cuisine", etc.

### What's Included

- **Create** a new category with a name and description
    
- **List** all available categories
    
- **Get** details of a specific category by ID
    
- **Update** an existing category's name, description, or active status
    
- **Delete** a category by ID
    
- **List plates** belonging to a specific category
    

### Authentication

All requests in this collection require a **Bearer Token**. Set your token in the active environment under the `access_token` variable.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

 ```

### Base URL

```
http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/categorie

 ```

### Notes

- Path variables (e.g., category ID) are embedded directly in the URL.
    
- All requests expect and return JSON. Make sure to include `Accept: application/json` and `Content-Type: application/json` headers where applicable.

request.description:
StartFragment

## GET /api/ingredients

### 📄 Description

Récupérer la liste de tous les ingrédients.

### 🔐 Auth

Admin uniquement

### 📥 Request

Aucun paramètre requis.

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "data": [    {      "id": 1,      "name": "Chicken",      "tags": ["contains_meat"]    },    {      "id": 2,      "name": "Milk",      "tags": ["contains_lactose"]    }  ]}

 ```

StartFragment

# Gestion des erreurs

### 🔴 401 Unauthorized

```
{  "message": "Unauthenticated"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## POST /api/ingredients

### 📄 Description

Créer un nouvel ingrédient.

### 🔐 Auth

Admin uniquement

### 📥 Request Body

```
{  "name": "Chicken",  "tags": [    "contains_meat",    "contains_cholesterol"  ]}

 ```

### Validation

- `name`: **required**, string, max 255
    
- `tags`: array (optionnel)
    
- `tags.\\*`: doit être parmi les valeurs autorisées
    

### 📤 Response (201 Created)

```
{  "message": "Ingredient created successfully",  "data": {    "id": 2,    "name": "Chicken",    "tags": [      "contains_meat",      "contains_cholesterol"    ]  }}

 ```

StartFragment

# Gestion des erreurs

### 🔴 401 Unauthorized

```
{  "message": "Unauthenticated"}

 ```

### 🔴 403 Forbidden

```
{  "message": "Access denied"}

 ```

### 🔴 422 Validation Error

```
{  "message": "Validation failed",  "errors": {    "name": ["The name field is required."]  }}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## PUT /api/ingredients/{id}

### 📄 Description

Mettre à jour un ingrédient existant.

### 🔐 Auth

Admin uniquement

### 📥 Request Body

```
{  "name": "Chicken Updated",  "tags": [    "contains_meat",    "contains_cholesterol"  ]}

 ```

### ⚠️ Notes

- Si tu envoies `tags`, il faut remplacer complètement les anciens tags.
    
- Si problème chez toi (comme tu as montré), c’est souvent:
    
    - problème de **sync / update array**
        
    - ou validation mal configurée
        

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "message": "Ingredient updated successfully",  "data": {    "id": 2,    "name": "Chicken Updated",    "tags": [      "contains_meat",      "contains_cholesterol"    ]  }}

 ```

StartFragment

# Gestion des erreurs

### 🔴 401 Unauthorized

```
{  "message": "Unauthenticated"}

 ```

### 🔴 403 Forbidden

```
{  "message": "Access denied"}

 ```

### 🔴 422 Validation Error

```
{  "message": "Validation failed",  "errors": {    "name": ["The name field is required."]  }}

 ```

### 🔴 404 Not Found

```
{  "message": "Ingredient not found"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## DELETE /api/ingredients/{id}

### 📄 Description

Supprimer un ingrédient.

### 🔐 Auth

Admin uniquement

### 📥 Request

Aucun body requis

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "message": "Ingredient deleted successfully"}

 ```

# Gestion des erreurs

### 🔴 401 Unauthorized

```
{  "message": "Unauthenticated"}

 ```

### 🔴 403 Forbidden

```
{  "message": "Access denied"}

 ```

### 🔴 404 Not Found

```
{  "message": "Ingredient not found"}

 ```

EndFragment

item.name: Plate Management
List all plates with recommendation score

request.description:
Retrieves a list of all plates available in the system, each enriched with its AI-based recommendation score.

**Authentication**  
Requires a Bearer token passed via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

**Headers**

- `Accept: application/json`
    

**What it does**

- Sends a `GET` request to `/api/plat`
    
- Returns all plates along with their associated recommendation scores
    
- Useful for displaying a ranked or scored menu to end users
    

**Notes**

- No request body is required
    
- Ensure `{{access_token}}` is set in the active environment before sending

Retrieves the full details of a specific plate, including its AI-generated recommendation data.

**Authentication**  
Requires a Bearer token passed via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

**Headers**

- `Accept: application/json`
    

**What it does**

- Sends a `GET` request to `/api/plat/{id}` (e.g., `/api/plat/1`)
    
- Returns detailed information about a single plate, including its recommendation score and related metadata
    
- Useful for plate detail pages or recommendation-driven views
    

**Notes**

- No request body is required
    
- Replace the plate ID in the URL with the target plate's ID
    
- Ensure `{{access_token}}` is set in the active environment before sending

Updates the details of an existing plate identified by its ID.

**Authentication**  
Requires a Bearer token passed via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

**Headers**

- `Accept: application/json`
    

**What it does**

- Sends a `PUT` request to `/api/plat/{id}` (e.g., `/api/plat/13`)
    
- Replaces the plate's existing data with the provided fields
    

**Request Body Fields**

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | The updated name of the plate |
| `description` | `string` | A short description of the dish |
| `price` | `number` | The updated price of the plate |
| `is_available` | `integer` | Availability flag (`1` = available, `0` = unavailable) |
| `category_id` | `array` | List of category IDs to associate with the plate |

**Notes**

- Replace the plate ID in the URL with the target plate's ID
    
- Ensure `{{access_token}}` is set in the active environment before sending

Creates a new plate entry in the system with the specified details, categories, and ingredients.

**Authentication**  
Requires a Bearer token passed via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

**Headers**

- `Accept: application/json`
    

**What it does**

- Sends a `POST` request to `/api/plat`
    
- Creates a new plate record and associates it with the given categories and ingredients
    

**Request Body Fields**

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | `string` | The name of the new plate |
| `description` | `string` | A short description of the dish |
| `price` | `number` | The price of the plate |
| `is_available` | `integer` | Availability flag (`1` = available, `0` = unavailable) |
| `category_id` | `array` | List of category IDs to associate with the plate |
| `ingredient_ids` | `array` | List of ingredient IDs to link to the plate |

**Notes**

- Ensure `{{access_token}}` is set in the active environment before sending

Permanently deletes a plate from the system by its ID.

**Authentication**  
Requires a Bearer token passed via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable.

**Headers**

- `Accept: application/json`
    

**What it does**

- Sends a `DELETE` request to `/api/plat/{id}` (e.g., `/api/plat/3`)
    
- Removes the specified plate record from the database
    

**Notes**

- No request body is required
    
- This action is **irreversible** — ensure the correct plate ID is specified before sending
    
- Replace the plate ID in the URL with the target plate's ID
    
- Ensure `{{access_token}}` is set in the active environment before sending

item.description:
## Plate Management

This collection covers the full lifecycle of managing plates (menu items) within the RestaurantAI-Brigade API. It provides endpoints to **create**, **read**, **update**, and **delete** plates, as well as retrieve enriched plate data that includes AI-generated recommendation scores.

### Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/api/plat` | List all plates along with their AI recommendation scores |
| `GET` | `/api/plat/{id}` | Retrieve full details of a specific plate, including its recommendation data |
| `POST` | `/api/plat` | Create a new plate |
| `PUT` | `/api/plat/{id}` | Update an existing plate's information |
| `DELETE` | `/api/plat/{id}` | Delete a plate by its ID |

### Notes

- All requests target the local development server at `http://127.0.0.1:8000`.
    
- Authentication may be required — ensure the `access_token` environment variable is set before sending requests.
    
- Plate listing and detail endpoints return recommendation scores computed by the AI engine, making this collection closely related to the **AI Recommendations** collection.

item.name: Profiel

request.description: Creates a new food category in the system. Sends a `POST` request to `/api/categorie` with a JSON body containing the category `name`, a `description`, and an `is_active` boolean flag. Requires a valid Bearer token (`{{access_token}}`).

Updates the dietary preference tags associated with the authenticated user's profile. This request sends a `PUT` to `/api/updateTags` with a JSON body containing a `dietary_tags` array (e.g., `vegan`, `no_cholesterol`). Authentication is handled via a Bearer token (`{{access_token}}`). Use this endpoint to replace the user's current dietary tags with a new set of preferences, which are then used to personalize AI-powered meal recommendations.

Removes one or more dietary preference tags from the authenticated user's profile. Sends a `DELETE` request to `/api/removeTags` with a JSON body containing a `dietary_tags` array listing the tags to be removed (e.g., `"vegan"`). Requires a valid Bearer token (`{{access_token}}`).

item.description:
## Profiel

This collection covers the **user profile management** endpoints of the RestaurantAI-Brigade API. It provides the requests needed to retrieve authenticated user information and manage the dietary preferences associated with a user's profile.

### Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/api/user` | Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information |
| `PUT` | `/api/updateTags` | Add or update dietary tags on the user's profile (e.g. `vegan`, `no_cholesterol`) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/removeTags` | Remove one or more dietary tags from the user's profile |
| `POST` | `/api/categorie` | Create a new food category |

### Authentication

All requests use **Bearer Token** authentication via the `{{access_token}}` environment variable. Make sure the `restaurant` environment is active and that `access_token` is set before sending any request.

---

item.name: AI Recommendations

request.description:
StartFragment

## POST /api/recommendations/analyze/{plate_id}

### 📄 Description

Lancer une analyse de compatibilité pour un plat.

👉 Cette action :

-   
    crée une recommendation avec `status = processing`
    
-   
    dispatch un **Job (Queue)**
    
-   
    calcule le score en background  
    

---

### 🔐 Auth

✅ Requise

---

### 📥 Request

Aucun body requis

---

### 📤 Response (202 Accepted)

```
{  "message": "Analysis started",  "status": "processing"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## GET /api/recommendations/{plate_id}

### 📄 Description

Récupérer le résultat d’analyse pour un plat spécifique.

---

### 🔐 Auth

✅ Requise

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

### ✔️ Cas 1: Analyse terminée

```
{  "plate_id": 1,  "score": 40,  "label": "Not Recommended",  "warning_message": "This plate contains lactose and gluten which do not match your dietary preferences.",  "status": "ready"}

 ```

---

### ⏳ Cas 2: En cours

```
{  "plate_id": 1,  "status": "processing"}

 ```

---

### ❌ Cas 3: Non trouvée

```
{  "message": "Recommendation not found"}

 ```

EndFragment

StartFragment

## GET /api/recommendations

### 📄 Description

Récupérer l’historique des recommandations de l’utilisateur.

---

### 🔐 Auth

✅ Requise

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "data": [    {      "plate_id": 1,      "score": 85,      "label": "Highly Recommended",      "status": "ready"    },    {      "plate_id": 2,      "score": null,      "label": null,      "status": "processing"    }  ]}

 ```

EndFragment

item.description:
StartFragment

# 🤖 AI Recommendations API (Queue & Jobs)

## 📌 Description

Ce module permet de lancer une **analyse de compatibilité alimentaire** entre un utilisateur et un plat (**plate**), en utilisant des **Jobs Laravel (queue)**.

-   
    L’analyse est **asynchrone** (status = `processing` → `ready`)  
    
-   
    Résultat basé sur les **préférences alimentaires** et les **tags des ingrédients**
    

---

## 🔐 Authentication

Toutes les routes nécessitent un utilisateur authentifié (Sanctum)

```
Authorization: Bearer {token}

 ```

---

# 📊 Structure d’une Recommendation

```
{  "plate_id": 1,  "score": 85,  "label": "Highly Recommended",  "warning_message": null,  "status": "ready",  "created_at": "2026-03-25T10:00:00"}

 ```

---

# 🧠 Scoring Rules

| Score | Résultat |
| --- | --- |
| ≥ 80 | Highly Recommended |
| 50 – 79 | Recommended with notes |
| < 50 | Not Recommended ⚠️ |

EndFragment

item.name: Admin Statistiques

request.description:
StartFragment

## GET /api/admin/stats

### 📄 Description

Retourne les statistiques globales de l’application.

---

### 📥 Request

Aucun paramètre requis

---

### 📤 Response (200 OK)

```
{  "users_count": 120,  "ingredients_count": 45,  "plates_count": 30,  "recommendations_count": 300,  "recommendations": {    "highly_recommended": 120,    "recommended": 100,    "not_recommended": 80  },  "processing_recommendations": 12,  "average_score": 67.5}

 ```

---

# 📊 Détails des champs

### 👥 `users_count`

Nombre total d’utilisateurs

### 🥗 `ingredients_count`

Nombre total d’ingrédients

### 🍽️ `plates_count`

Nombre total de plats

### 🤖 `recommendations_count`

Nombre total d’analyses effectuées

---

### 📈 `recommendations`

Répartition des résultats :

- `highly_recommended` → score ≥ 80
    
- `recommended` → score entre 50 et 79
    
- `not_recommended` → score < 50
    

---

### ⏳ `processing_recommendations`

Nombre d’analyses en cours (`status = processing`)

---

### 📊 `average_score`

Score moyen global des recommandations

EndFragment

item.description:
StartFragment

# Admin Statistics API

## 📌 Description

Permet à un **administrateur** de récupérer une **vue globale des statistiques** de l’application.

👉 Utile pour :

-   
    Dashboard admin  
    
-   
    Monitoring activité  
    
-   
    Analyse des recommandations  
    

---

## 🔐 Authentication

✅ Admin uniquement (Sanctum + rôle Admin)

```
Authorization: Bearer {token}

 ```

EndFragment
